notes: Culprit lowers the TSO CAS retry budget -> during TSO leader-election the FoundationDB CAS operations exhaust their (now too small) retry budget and time out -> olapdb-tso fails to issue commit timestamps -> olapdb-server CnchLock acquire times out -> the stream-taskmanager Flink taskmanager job (Metric_threshold_monitoring_job) goes unhealthy and platform-api metadata queries 5xx. Onset is ~6min delayed (budget only exhausts under leader-election churn). The dashboard-svc chart-cache deploy near onset is an innocent decoy.
